message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

database Database
participant ManageLogDemo
participant ManageLogReceiveFacade
participant ManageLogReceiveProvider
participant ManageLogCommon
participant AnotherJavaProject
participant ManageLogUploadFacade
participant AnotherProject
participant ManageLogQueryProvider
participant ManageLogQueryFacade

group rpc 上传日志
    ManageLogDemo -> ManageLogReceiveFacade : aspect 获取数据
    ManageLogReceiveFacade -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> ManageLogCommon : 使用工具类
    ManageLogCommon -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> Database : 落地数据
end

group 自主使用 facade 上传日志
    AnotherJavaProject -> ManageLogReceiveFacade : 自己组装数据，使用 facade 提供的策略上传
    ManageLogReceiveFacade -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> ManageLogCommon : 使用工具类
    ManageLogCommon -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> Database : 落地数据
end

group 自主上传日志
    AnotherProject -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> ManageLogCommon : 使用工具类
    ManageLogCommon -> ManageLogReceiveProvider : 抓取配置
    ManageLogReceiveProvider -> Database : 落地数据
end

group 日志查询
    Database -> Database : 获取数据
    Database -> ManageLogQueryProvider
    ManageLogQueryProvider -> ManageLogQueryFacade : rpc 提供
    ManageLogQueryFacade -> ManageLogQueryProvider : http 提供（默认）
end

database Database
participant ManageLogDemo
participant ManageLogReceiveFacade
participant ManageLogReceiveProvider
participant ManageLogCommon
participant AnotherJavaProject
participant ManageLogUploadFacade
participant AnotherProject
participant ManageLogQueryProvider
participant ManageLogQueryFacade

@enduml
```
